title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: ASHLAND HIGH SCHOOL SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 201 S Mountain Avenue Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: -Students enrolled in Ashland High School -Ashland High School staff and families -All School district students Hours: Mental Health Services: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Medical Services: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm (541) 482-8771 2 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 482-8771 ext 2 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ASHLAND HIGH SCHOOL SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER
